title: 2 Trillion Parameters Face-off: Kimi K3 Tops the Charts, Moonshot Invites Musk to Join
excerpt: A public exchange between Chinese Weibo and English social platforms brought the competitive tension of the large model parameter race to the forefront. On July
content_html:
A public exchange between Chinese Weibo and English social platforms brought the competitive tension of the large model parameter race to the forefront. On July 20, Moonshot AI released its new open-source large model, Kimi K3, which topped global rankings and attracted widespread attention. Just a few days earlier, a statement from Elon Musk had extended this competition from rankings into a verbal battle.

On the morning of July 18, Musk posted on a social platform stating that his 2-trillion-parameter model outperformed the current 1.5-trillion-parameter version in all aspects, and would complete preliminary training next week, possibly surpassing Kimi. He also claimed that the new model's reasoning speed and Token efficiency would be close to the existing 1.5T model, Grok4.5. This statement effectively raised the benchmark for parameter scale to over 2 trillion at the moment when Kimi K3 had just topped the charts.

Moonshot AI responded directly and sharply. It publicly posted on Weibo, @Musk, and only left one sentence: "Welcome to the 2-trillion+ club." A seemingly casual invitation actually used the momentum of its top ranking to present its open-source achievements as the threshold of the club.

sentences.en: It publicly posted on Weibo, @Musk, and only left one sentence: "Welcome to the 2-trillion+ club."

sentences.zh: 看似随意的邀请，实则借其排名靠前的气势，将其开源成果作为俱乐部的门槛。

content_html_zh:
一场中文微博和英文社交平台的公开交流，将大模型参数竞赛的竞争紧张气氛推向了风口浪尖。 7月20日，Moonshot AI发布全新开源大模型Kimi K3，登顶全球排行榜，引起广泛关注。 就在几天前，埃隆·马斯克(Elon Musk)发表声明，将这场竞争从排名延伸为口水战。

7月18日上午，马斯克在社交平台发文表示，他的2万亿参数模型在各方面都优于当前的1.5万亿参数版本，并将于下周完成初步训练，可能会超越Kimi。 他还声称新模型的推理速度和Token效率将接近现有的1.5T模型Grok4.5。 这一说法，在Kimi K3刚刚登顶的时刻，有效地将参数规模的基准提升到了2万亿以上。

Moonshot AI 的反应直接而敏锐。 它在微博上公开发帖@马斯克，只留下一句话：“欢迎来到2万亿+俱乐部”。 看似随意的邀请，实则借其排名靠前的气势，将其开源成果作为俱乐部的门槛。
